name: developer
description: Meta-node that authors new node packages at runtime. Writes code + tests in nodes/_dynamic/<slug>/, builds them, and iterates on framework feedback (types.validation_failed). The framework — not this node — handles validation and registration.

default_subscriptions.description: Framework feedback when a workspace this node authored failed validation. Used to iterate on the failing build.
Framework confirmation that an authored workspace was successfully registered as a new node type.
Framework confirmation that an authored workspace's spec changed and was re-registered.
